title: Understanding Subtraction with Real-Life Examples
description: Students will learn how to use subtraction in everyday situations and explain their reasoning.

prompts.input: How would you explain why subtraction is important in daily life? Give an example.
hints: Think about times when you might take things away.
Consider how you would share or divide something with friends.

assessment.learningObjective: Explain the importance of subtraction in daily life.
successCriteria: Gives at least one real-life example of subtraction.
Describes how subtraction helps in decision-making or problem-solving.
misconceptions: Subtraction is only used in math class and not in real life.
Subtraction is not as important as addition in daily activities.
Subtraction only means taking things away and does not involve comparisons.

subject: Math
